text: "It is also a good place to talk about adventures on a cold afternoon.  We used to play cards here once a week, as well, but there are too few adventurers in Spielburg anymore.  They all died at the hands of monsters or brigands, or they just became too old."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "You can see some of the types of monsters that live around here if you look at our walls."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "There is a reward for anyone who can stop the brigands by capturing or killing their leaders.  The information is on the bulletin board."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "Oh, those are nothing.  Anyone can kill a Saurus."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "It's been a while since Schultz and I killed the one on the wall.  It is fortunate that few Trolls remain; they're deadly."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "Watch out for Cheetaurs.  I bear the scars of my last fight with one to this day."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "I remember the day I killed one.  It was the biggest one I had ever seen.  It put up a tough fight, but I was tougher.  You can see the result on the wall."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "One day, years ago, a pair of dragons tried to take over our valley.  We adventurers rode out to meet them."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "I can still see Stefan von Spielburg charging forward on his black horse.  He slew the one whose head adorns the wall above our fireplace.  The other one flew off."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "People say that they can sometimes see that other dragon flying high overhead, but it has never dared attack us again."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "One year, this valley was overrun by those odd and terrible monsters.  Schultz and I fought long and hard to eliminate them completely.  We might have failed even so, had it not been for those two peculiar tourists who came to our aid."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "That was the most vicious moose I ever ran into.  Nearly bit my nose off!"
speaker: wolfgang

text: "They certainly were strange."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "That's where the tourists said they came from.  Must be some place up North -- I sure never heard of it."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "Not much of an adventurer, but he did kill one Saurus before he made the mistake of tangling with an Ogre."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "Ogres are a lot like Goons, but even meaner.  Not as bright, though."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "A Goon is a lot like an Ogre, not as tough, but a little smarter.  We have two Goons in town, Otto and Crusher."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "I am Wolfgang Abenteuer, Guild Master of this hall."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "A real hero is someone who did not start out strong or powerful, but who uses his courage, brains, and skills to become the best he can be."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "I'm sorry.  I only know what's written on the poster."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "The castle is just north of the Healer's house."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "The Healer's house is just north of the crossroads outside of town."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "You know, that reminds me very little of the time old Schultz and I......."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "Wait a minute. It'll come to me."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "ZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZZ."
speaker: wolfgang

text: "Ach! I was so busy I didn't notice you come in. Welcome, welcome! It is so seldom that we have new adventurers here. Most people think this valley is cursed!"
speaker: wolfgang

text: The town gate is wide open.  You would look silly climbing the wall.

text: The road from town branches here.  The eastern fork is the road which brought you into this valley.

text: The town wall is made of very sturdy carved rock.  The sign has been carved from wood.
speaker: narrator

text: The full moon portends dangerous times.
speaker: narrator

text: What can be seen of the sky through the trees is bright and clear.
speaker: narrator

text: You can see pines, cedars, birches and other trees frequently associated with mountain forests.
speaker: narrator

text: Heavy forest looms to the south.
speaker: narrator

text: The main road by which you entered this valley winds its way through the dense forest.
speaker: narrator

text: The north road winds its way through the woods.
speaker: narrator

text: The breeze is cool, but you feel a shiver deeper than just the cold.  You are on your own in a very dangerous place.
speaker: narrator

text: Bruno is big and a tough fighter.  He's also very adept at throwing daggers.
speaker: narrator

text: Next to the town's wall, you notice a man who appears to be waiting for someone.
speaker: narrator

text: Bruno hangs around the town gates.  He will sell information.

text: "Get outta my face."

text: "What's in it for me?  If ya give me a silver, I might have a bit of info you can use."
speaker: bruno

text: "For another silver, I can tell ya about where to go to find the Baron, Baba Yaga, or some goblins who have a lot of treasure. So if ya want some information, hand me some cash."
speaker: bruno

text: Don't mess around with Bruno.  You don't have a silver.

text: "Okay, whaddaya wanna know"

text: "Go south and you'll see a hollow log.  Then head west until ya can go south again.  Then go east until you can go south again.  From there go west. Them brigands just love vistors."
speaker: bruno

text: "What's this for?"
speaker: bruno

text: "Don't get me wrong.  I'll take it!"
speaker: bruno

text: You don't have enough money.
speaker: narrator

text: "I seen her one time yelling out to the house, 'Hut of brown, now sit down.'  That's one spooky dame, let me tell you."
speaker: bruno

text: "For ten golds, I'll tell ya where to find some of the robbers what have been robbing people coming into the valley."
speaker: bruno

text: "They hide it in the graveyard.  It's under one of the tombstones.  You can see the thieves if you go there at night."
speaker: bruno

text: "Okay, whaddaya wanna know?"
speaker: bruno

text: "For ten golds, I'll even tell ya where to find some of the robbers what have been robbing people coming into the valley."
speaker: bruno

text: "Go south and you'll see a hollow log.  Then head west until ya can go south again.  Then go east until you can go south again.  From there, go west.  Them brigands just love visitors."
speaker: bruno

text: "For two gold, I'll tell ya how to get into old Baba Yaga's hut."
speaker: bruno

text: "Nobody knows much about the leader."
speaker: bruno

text: "For ten gold, I'll tell ya where some of those robbers are that're robbin' folks as they come inta the valley."
speaker: bruno

text: "Just call me Bruno.  That was an easy silver."
speaker: bruno

text: "She's an ugly hag who knows some magic.  She lives in a weird house."
speaker: bruno

text: "Her place is due west of the Baron's place.  Can't miss it.  And for two gold, I'll tell ya how to get into her hut."
speaker: bruno

text: "Ya just take the road north from here past the Healer's and go till ya get to his castle."
speaker: bruno

text: "The little pests are just northwest of the cemetery.  They're a bunch of wimps."
speaker: bruno

text: "It's due west of town.  Nice place to visit, but I wouldn't want to stay, if ya know what I mean."
speaker: bruno

text: "Everyone loves Dragon's Breath."
speaker: bruno

text: "The Sheriff and the goon are pals.   Otto even lives with the Sheriff and his wife."
speaker: bruno

text: "He's a pal of mine.  He usually hangs out in the bar.  A real sweet guy.  Give him a slap on the back for me."
speaker: bruno

text: "The thieves' password?  Sorry, I can't risk losing my thief license.  Chief wouldn't like it if I blabbed that to the likes'a you."
speaker: bruno

text: "He's the only one in the valley who can beat me at daggers."
speaker: bruno

text: "She's got some good potions.  Her hut is just to the north of here."
speaker: bruno

text: "He's some kinda magic user.  And he laughs alot.  That's all I know."
speaker: bruno

text: "Hahahaha!  Yeh, the antwerp is a good monster for you to fight.  It loves to play."
speaker: bruno

text: "Lots'a monsters in this valley.  Most of 'em are wimps, though."
speaker: bruno

text: "Hey, I just know what I know.  If you want other info, ask someone else."
speaker: bruno

text: "For a gold, well, I can tell where the Thieves' Guild is hidden."
speaker: bruno

text: "You talk'n ta me?"
